transcript: Speaker A: I've been learning Spanish on Duolingo. It's free, easy, and actually works. ¡Me encanta la playa! [I love the beach!] See, not too bad. Download Duolingo for free, and start learning something new.
on_screen_text:
duolingo
I've been learning Spanish on Duolingo.
It's free, easy, and actually works.
¡Me encanta la playa! [I love the beach!]
See, not too bad.
Download Duolingo for free, and start learning something new.
summary: An animated bear promotes Duolingo by demonstrating his Spanish skills. He emphasizes that the app is free, easy, and effective. The call to action invites viewers to download Duolingo for free.
